query:
INSERT INTO course_enrollments (userId, courseId, accessCodeId) 
SELECT u.id, c.id, 1 
FROM users u, courses c 
WHERE (u.email = 'teststudent@crosslife.test' OR u.role = 'admin')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE enrolledAt = NOW();
